reviews.comment:
Aclara siempre que sos socio del acá sino no te dan ni la hora.  Incluso hasta te niegan el baño si no sos socio . Cosa que me pareció muy malo .

(Translated by Google)
Always make it clear that you're a member here, otherwise they won't even give you the time of day. They'll even deny you the bathroom if you're not a member. Which I thought was really bad.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11465332764445308403/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXOC0tNHZnRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Very good and fast service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11465332764445308403/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXLWJhNFFnEAE

reviews.comment:
Utilizamos el servicio de comidas. Variedad y buen precio, considerando que es un patio de comidas rápidas. Nos permitieron estacionar sin cargo y utilizar el baño. Muy buena atención de sus empleados

(Translated by Google)
We used the food service. Variety and good prices, considering it's a fast-food court. They let us park for free and use the restroom. The staff was very attentive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11465332764445308403/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXdXRMTXhRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Nos trataron bastante mal... Solo por pedir la llave del baño , tuvimos q justificar que habíamos cargado nafta para q nos den la llave .
Especialmente la cajera

(Translated by Google)
They treated us pretty badly... Just for asking for the bathroom key, we had to justify that we had filled up with gas to get the key.
Especially the cashier.
